title: "of()"
description: "of: synchronous values — each argument as DATA, then COMPLETE. `of()` is the EMPTY source."

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

of: synchronous values — each argument as DATA, then COMPLETE. `of()` is the EMPTY source.

## Import

```ts
import { of } from "@graphrefly/ts/sources";
```

## Signature

```ts
function of(...values: T[]): Operator<never, T>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `values` | `T[]` | Values to emit synchronously on activation. |

## Returns

A source operator that emits each value and then COMPLETE.

## Example

```ts
import { graph } from "@graphrefly/ts/graph";
import { of } from "@graphrefly/ts/sources";

const values = graph().initNode(of(1, 2, 3), []);
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/graph/sources.ts`
